name: Amaretto Brownies Supreme
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325 degrees. Melt butter and chocolate in a saucepan over low heat. Remove from heat, let cool. Then stir in eggs. Add sugar, flour, salt, and pecans, mixing well. Pour batter into a greased 8-inch square pan and bake for 30 to 35 minutes. Brownies should still be soft. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. Poke holes in brownies with fork, and pour amaretto liqueur over top. Refrigerate overnight. Spread Chocolate Amaretto Frosting over brownies and then drizzle White Almond Icing in a criss-cross pattern on top.
CHOCOLATE AMARETTO FROSTING: Combine butter, sugar, salt, amaretto liqueur, cocoa powder, and coffee and beat until smooth.
WHITE ALMOND ICING: Combine sugar, salt, and almond extract. Add half-and-half a little at a time, mixing until smooth.
